reference: I have just been told I have fatty atrophy of the pancreas and I have rheumatoid arthritis. My sister had cystic fibrosis. Is it serious? I did get very dark stools and had an endoscopy in my stomach, but they can't find anything there. I am worried about pancreatic cancer, and I get very bad abdominal pains where I feel like I am going to pass out and get palpitations in my stomach at the same time.
